## Ship gates

See [SHIP_GATES.md](../SHIP_GATES.md).

- [ ] **Tier A** green (CI on this PR, or `bash scripts/smoke-ci.sh` locally)

- [ ] If layout / score / share / shifts touched → note Tier C/D rows to re-run after deploy
